name: @nicia-ai/lachesis-benchmark
description: Node-only controlled experiment controller for Lachesis
author: Nicia AI

scripts.smoke: node --input-type=module -e "const api = await import('./dist/controller.js'); const m3b = await import('./dist/m3b1-controller.js'); const manifests = await import('./dist/m3b1-manifests.js'); if (typeof api.preflightPhase !== 'function' || typeof api.generateStoredReport !== 'function' || typeof m3b.preflightM3b1 !== 'function' || typeof m3b.executeM3b1 !== 'function' || typeof manifests.materializeM3b1Phase !== 'function') process.exit(1);"
